texto: You've captured my flag but I captured your imagination. It's true you regulate what I grow, regulate what i know, and to pray or to play I got to pay you a fee, pero we both know that you wish you could dance like me.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Vincent Torres: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “You've captured my flag but I captured your imagination. It's true you regulate what I grow, regu…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, inspirational-life, captured pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de inspiracao e reflexao.

frase_original: You've captured my flag but I captured your imagination. It's true you regulate what I grow, regulate what i know, and to pray or to play I got to pay you a fee, pero we both know that you wish you could dance like me.
